Count.metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.31+commit.fd3a2265"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"count","outputs":[{"internalType":"int256","name":"","type":"int256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"time","type":"uint256"}],"name":"decWhile","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"getCount","outputs":[{"internalType":"int256","name":"","type":"int256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"time","type":"uint256"}],"name":"incWhile","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"incWhile(uint256)":{"notice":"// inc and dec using loop function: function incLoop(uint times) public{ for (uint i = 0; i < times; i++){ count += 1; } } function decLoop(uint times) public { for (uint i = 0; i < times; i++){ count -= 1; } }*"}},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"ethTutorials/IncDecCount.sol":"Count"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"ethTutorials/IncDecCount.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd4a9f8b238fe85ab49d6479507b1d623356374a903c29029d56f6a2ce62f68d1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9931c814cc56272fb205d66c29a2ea51b66aa017d2cefb9455283679717d6bf4","dweb:/ipfs/QmYsFx9tkHtzLBMcEMgDh3mkzxassSYmbwDwnqrSQ2bgvt"]}},"version":1}

incWhile(uint256).notice: // inc and dec using loop function: function incLoop(uint times) public{ for (uint i = 0; i < times; i++){ count += 1; } } function decLoop(uint times) public { for (uint i = 0; i < times; i++){ count -= 1; } }*
